Petition Under Code 850 Et Seq. By Claimant To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, For Order Authorizing And Directing Representative To Transfer Estate Property To Petitioner
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Continued To Feb-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yasmin Gilani (Counsel for Phillip Bell, Petitioner); Henry Shain (Counsel for Donavan Stampp, Personal Representative), Phillip Bell (Petitioner).

Note: The matter was called at 9:20 a.m. at the request of Mr. Shain who was required to appear in another matter at 9:00 a.m.

Counsel advised the Court that they have been unable to resolve outstanding issues and that the matter should be sent out for trial in the civil department as there were counterclaims (partition, etc.) that would need to be resolved along with the instant petition. However, at the Court's suggestion, counsel agreed to pro bono mediation which was so ordered (the Order for same signed in open court). Also by Court Order, mediation must be completed by February 23, 2007 and the matter was set for status hearing on February 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR #7782 ; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
